topics.title: Robin Quivers and Jim Florentine Relationship
topics.summary: The studio discusses the public debut of Robin Quivers and Jim Florentine as a couple at a charity event and addresses rumors regarding George Takei's tenure on The Simpsons.

topics.title: Artie Lange's Absence and Health Speculation
topics.summary: The studio discusses Artie Lange's absence from the show, debating whether it is due to illness related to his weight or potential substance abuse.

topics.title: Jay Leno and the Writers Strike
topics.summary: The studio discusses reports of Jay Leno's treatment of his non-writing staff during the writers strike, specifically regarding pay discrepancies and public criticism from his employees.

topics.title: Tributes to Lonnie Heckman and Jay Leno Interview
topics.summary: The studio reports on the tribute paid to fan Lonnie Heckman by the band Shaw Blades, discusses an interview with Jay Leno regarding his staff, and mentions a new song from Billy Joel.

topics.title: Billy Joel and Wayne Newton
topics.summary: The studio features a new song by Billy Joel titled "Christmas in Fallujah" and includes an interview with Wayne Newton regarding his past professional conflicts with Johnny Carson.

topics.title: Jessica Hahn's Encounter with Evil Knievel
topics.summary: The studio features a guest recounting her sexual encounter and personal interactions with the late stunt performer Evil Knievel.

topics.title: Intellectual Property and Game Show Ripoffs
topics.summary: The studio discusses the legal implications of a television network using a game format that mirrors a segment previously featured on their program.

topics.title: Johnny Rebel Music Review
topics.summary: The studio explores a collection of racially charged songs by Johnny Rebel, discussing the artist's provocative titles and the quality of the musical production.

topics.title: Deirdre Imus Radio Return
topics.summary: The studio discusses the return of Deirdre Imus to radio, her new co-host, and the controversy surrounding her previous remarks.

topics.title: Comedy Impressions and Roast Stories
topics.summary: The studio features a comedy segment where Craig Gass performs various celebrity impressions while discussing his experiences at a roast for Gene Simmons.

topics.title: Craig Gass Comedy Stories
topics.summary: The studio features comedian Craig Gass sharing anecdotes about his past, including a roast involving Gilbert Gottfried, his experiences in rehab, and interactions with celebrities like Al Pacino.

topics.title: Howard 100 News Updates
topics.summary: The studio features segments covering celebrity news, local reports on missing personalities, and various human interest stories including a report on a wealthy dog's safety.

topics.title: Senator Allegations and Media News
topics.summary: The studio discusses allegations of a senator's personal life, reports on a radio host's return to air, and covers news regarding cybercrime, tourism marketing, and a hostage situation.

topics.title: Sports News and Celebrity Honors
topics.summary: The studio covers NFL game results, the memorial for Sean Taylor, celebrity tributes to Elizabeth Taylor, and upcoming comedy tour dates.
